expected_score_rule: Contract-test expected values are explicit in this artifact; generated tests MUST NOT infer missing score/band/risk behavior from prose.

deterministic_generation.recipe: Call the summary aggregation helper with already-rounded item scores [0.123456, 0.123457]. Arithmetic mean is 0.1234565 and half-even to 6 decimals MUST return 0.123456 because the sixth decimal 6 is even.

required_assertions: mean rounding uses decimal half-even, not binary float approximation
